meta.notes: INFRASTRUCTURE ISSUES: (1) fal.ai SeeDance read timeout (30s) on first submission attempt for both acts — jobs submitted successfully but polling connection timed out after ~355s. Both retried successfully. (2) MiniMax proxy (7i30hpv4bo9ud5mhianq.pika.art) down for BGM — 3 attempts all failed with RemoteDisconnected/SSLEOFError, 228s wasted. BGM reused from prior TVC run. LLM phase was short (~25s) because prompts were reused from same-session TVC#2; a fresh run from scratch would add ~180-300s for concept+tone+script+Seedance prompt generation. Wall total inflated by ~583s of failed retries. Estimated clean-infrastructure wall: ~390s.

test_input.name: freitag-sky-blue-backpack-brief
test_input.description: Freitag sky-blue tarp cube backpack TVC from brand brief. Concept: 'The City Gave It Back'. 2 local images (bag.webp + logo.png), no character ref image.

task.name: short-ads
task.purpose: Generate 30s brand TVC for FREITAG from brand brief: 2×15s SeeDance acts, MiniMax BGM, ElevenLabs VO, ffmpeg encode
task.expected_output: Landscape 16:9 MP4 (30s) with SeeDance-generated video (2 acts), ambient electronic BGM, deep English VO slogan, crop+eq colour grade

install.notes: No install step — skill pre-installed at ~/nova3-agent-skills/short-ads/

asset_acquisition.notes: Assets local on Desktop (Logo_Freitag.png, bag.webp). No download needed.

steps.name: llm_concept_script_prompts
steps.notes: LLM phase: concept, brand tone profile, 10-shot visual script, 2x Seedance prompt pairs (EN). Short because prompts reused from same-session TVC#2 run. Fresh run from scratch estimated 180-300s.

steps.name: seedance_act1
steps.notes: SeeDance 2.0 r2v Act 1 (retry). Start: 05:07:51Z, end: 05:11:24Z. 1 image ref (bag). First attempt timed out after ~355s (fal.ai 30s read timeout). seed=2122624967. Output: 4.0MB.

steps.name: seedance_act2
steps.notes: SeeDance 2.0 r2v Act 2 (retry). Start: 05:07:51Z, end: 05:12:00Z. 2 image refs (bag + logo). First attempt timed out. seed=896947552. Output: 4.9MB.

steps.name: seedance_wall
steps.notes: Acts ran in parallel. Wall time = max(act1=213s, act2=249s). Not sum.

steps.name: ffmpeg_concat
steps.notes: ffmpeg -f concat joining act1+act2 into 30.08s video_noaudio.mp4. Measured: 8265ms.

steps.name: bgm_minimax
steps.notes: REUSED from prior run (65.5s track). MiniMax proxy failed all 3 attempts (228s wasted, RemoteDisconnected + SSLEOFError). Typical clean-run duration: 60-120s.

steps.name: vo_elevenlabs
steps.notes: ElevenLabs eleven_v3, Brian voice (nPczCjzI2devNBz1zQrb). Text: 'The city gave it back.' Measured: 2778ms. Output: 1.2s / 24.9KB.

steps.name: ffmpeg_encode
steps.notes: Final encode: crop=1200:675:40:22, scale=1280:720, eq brightness+contrast, BGM 0.45vol, VO 3.0vol at 27683ms. crf=16 preset=slow. Measured: 16029ms. Output: 11MB.

execution.notes: execution.total_s = wall_total (671s). skill_run_s = sum of successful step durations (25+249+8+0+3+16=301). llm_overhead_s = wall_total - skill_run_s = 671-301 = 370, but ~355s of that is failed first-attempt polling overhead, not LLM thinking. True LLM overhead ~25s this run. Failed attempts: 2x fal.ai read timeout (~355s each submitted in parallel), 3x MiniMax proxy fail (228s, overlapped).

delivery.notes: Local delivery only. No CDN upload.

tokens._note: Extracted via extract-cc-tokens.py --after 2026-04-23T05:01:31Z --before 2026-04-23T05:12:42Z. 34 messages matched, 686 filtered out. effective_input_tokens=5371376. High cache_read due to large SKILL.md being re-read and long session context.

totals._note: llm_pct inflated by fal.ai retry overhead (~355s polling failures misclassified as LLM overhead). True LLM thinking ~25s this run (prompts reused). Estimated clean-infrastructure breakdown: tool_calls ~330s, llm ~60s, wall ~390s → llm_pct ~15%, skill_pct ~85%.
